'''Tolas''' was an elderly [[Human/Legends|Human]] male living on [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] in [[3951 BBY]]. Tolas was a successful merchant who was not afraid to utilize shady practices to make money, though all his dealings were legal, as he said. He was the owner of [[1B-8D-GE3|1B-8D]], described by [[Panar]] as "the perfect fence for [[Droid/Legends|droid]] parts". When he was met by [[Meetra Surik]] during her visit to [[Iziz/Legends|Iziz]], Tolas offered to purchase a [[starport visa]] from her in order to get offworld and Surik may have given him one.

==Behind the scenes==
Though Tolas claims that his buying price for an open starport visa is the best to be had at two thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], through persuasion he will offer three thousand. Still, there is actually another, better offer to be had in the [[Unidentified Iziz cantina|Iziz cantina]].

Tolas has the same face model as [[Davik Kang]], the [[Exchange]] boss on [[Taris/Legends|Taris]], from [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic|''Knights of the Old Republic'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
